selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next uncovered parent after the active A1 judgment reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the first revision-ladder export packet into a smaller controller-usable boundary set without rereading raw sources or promoting `work/out` artifacts into active law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest adjacent active sibling because it continues the `a1_state` family in folder order.
Strongest work-surface follow-on once the first revision ladder is narrowed.
Later active sibling after the first entropy-control family is handled.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the revision ladder, its drift signatures, and its packaging-control changes needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: DELTA_CORE_STABILITY_WITH_EXTRACT_ACCRETION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves how the delta line actually evolved without smoothing away internal version freeze.

candidate_items.name: LEAN_PATCH_INTENT_IS_NOT_SCALE_SETTLEMENT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps prompt-side lean intent visible without letting it masquerade as stable downstream packaging scale.

candidate_items.name: UPDATE_PACK_METADATA_LAG_AND_FORWARD_REFERENCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent packet's strongest update-pack drift signals into one controller-usable rule.

candidate_items.name: BOOTSTRAP_OUTER_LABEL_AND_INTERNAL_READ_FIRST_MUST_BOTH_SURVIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps bootstrap self-description drift explicit instead of silently privileging one label layer.

candidate_items.name: READ_FIRST_CONTROL_SPINE_TIGHTENING_IS_REAL_REVISION_SIGNAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the substantive control expansion in bootstrap `v4` despite stable overlay framing.

candidate_items.name: THIN_AND_UNEVEN_SIDECAR_INTEGRITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's weakest-but-consistent integrity convention without overstating auditability.

quarantined_items.name: WORK_OUT_REVISION_LADDER_AS_ACTIVE_TRANSPORT_OR_RUNTIME_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The entire family remains spillover revision archaeology under `work/out`.

quarantined_items.name: REVISION_ORDER_AS_DOWNSTREAM_APPLY_SUCCESS_OR_TRUE_SEQUENTIAL_HISTORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves forward-reference drift and uneven sequence alignment rather than one clean applied history.

notes: This batch preserves the first revision ladder as spillover export archaeology and control-drift evidence rather than active law.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
